twitch_client_id.title: TWITCH_CLIENT_ID
twitch_client_id.description: Sets TWITCH_CLIENT_ID for the Twitch Helix MCP server.

twitch_client_secret.title: TWITCH_CLIENT_SECRET
twitch_client_secret.description: Sets TWITCH_CLIENT_SECRET for the Twitch Helix MCP server.

twitch_oauth_scope.title: TWITCH_OAUTH_SCOPE
twitch_oauth_scope.description: Sets TWITCH_OAUTH_SCOPE for the Twitch Helix MCP server. Required by the generated client for credential refresh or hand-written auth flow.
